_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.
_publications._context: MPNST cells were infected with purified Ad-NF1-GRD or control Ad-GFP, in triplicate, for 2 h in serum-free medium | NF1-GRD sequence was introduced in Nf1−/− MEFs using the pMSCV-GRD vector | a virus expressing the full-length NF1 GTPase-activating related domain (NF1 GRD) and pac (MSCV-NF1 GRD-pac) | The human NF1-GRD was amplified using the genomic deoxyribonucleic acid (gDNA) from HEK293T as polymerase chain reaction template and subcloned into TTIGFP-MLUEX vector

_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor growth of neurofibromin-deficient cells is driven by decreased respiration and hampered by NAD
Nf1+/- mast cells induce neurofibroma like phenotypes through secreted TGF-beta signaling.
CDK4/6 inhibition enhances SHP2 inhibitor efficacy and is dependent upon RB function in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.
